ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of representation */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty associated with the athlete */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Current team or organization associated with the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty (e.g., Giant Slalom, Downhill) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the competition is held */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the competition's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition where the event took place */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who participated */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty associated with the event */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Final placement of the athlete in the event */,
  "score" REAL /* Score or time achieved by the athlete */,
  "penalty_time" REAL /* Penalty time (if applicable) */,
  "dq" INTEGER /* Disqualification flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event result's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event result's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Specialty that the coach focuses on */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the coach */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coach's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_specialty_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialty_id") REFERENCES specialties ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in hours */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* Focus area for the training session (e.g., speed, technique) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the training session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_resource" TEXT /* Resource that was accessed (e.g., athlete profile, training session) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_coaches" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching relationship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes_specialties" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the athlete's participation in the specialty */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the athlete's participation in the specialty (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id", "specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_specialties" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id", "specialty_id")
)
